Title: Oversized Sage Green Graphic T-Shirt with Pocket Detail
Description:
Elevate your basics collection with this effortlessly cool sage green graphic tee. Designed for ultimate comfort and modern style, this shirt features a subtle pocket placement that adds a sophisticated, casual edge to any outfit. It's the perfect blend of relaxed comfort and streetwear flair, making it an essential piece for everyday style.

  • Supreme Comfort Fit: Crafted from a breathable, soft fabric that feels great all day long, ensuring maximum comfort whether you're running errands or relaxing at home.
  • Modern Graphic Detail: Features a distinct, pocket-sized graphic print that provides a subtle pop of color and visual interest without overwhelming your look.
  • Versatile Styling: The relaxed, oversized fit and muted sage tone make this shirt incredibly versatile, easily pairing with jeans, shorts, or joggers for a cohesive, stylish look.

This t-shirt is ideal for making a confident statement while staying comfortable. It makes a fantastic gift for anyone who appreciates minimalist design with an artistic touch. Dress it up for a casual night out or keep it simple for weekend errands—this tee fits every occasion.
